title: Board Alerts or Notices
excerpt: Hi, it would be great to have rolling notices on Boards or Dashboards to highlight tips for users about how to use the board which are specific to the users of that company. i.e. these are not tips on how to use Monday.c…

posts.author: EdGra (Ed)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, it would be great to have rolling notices on Boards or Dashboards to highlight tips for users about how to use the board which are specific to the users of that company. i.e. these are not tips on how to use Monday.com, but instead are tips on how the users of the board should use the board as per the design of the admins that have made that board. e.g. this would work in the same way that computer games give tips to how to play the game while it’s loading. Instead of game tips, they are tips on how the board should be used relating to the board creator’s specific requirements.
